zh.lifeSummary: 當John Edward Rhodes於1620年出生在根西島時，他的父親Walter Wilson Rhodes43歲，母親Elizabeth Joanna Barstow39歲。他於1634年12月9日與Anne Marbury Browne在英國英格蘭米德萊可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1701年11月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Edward Rhodes于1620年出生在根西岛时，他的父亲Walter Wilson Rhodes43岁，母亲Elizabeth Joanna Barstow39岁。他于1634年12月9日与Anne Marbury Browne在英国英格兰米德萊可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1701年11月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rhodes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:

either a topographic name for someone who lived by ‘(the) woodland clearings’, plural form of Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, principally Rhodes in Bury (Lancashire) or possibly from one of the many minor places in Yorkshire similarly named, or Rhodes Minnis (Kent). The Yorkshire name sometimes alternates with the singular form (see Rhode and Rode ). The Rh- spelling was introduced in the 16th and 17th centuries by clerks with a classical education, who associated the name with the Greek island of Rhodes, famous in ancient history and mythology. There is also no connection with modern English road (Old English rād ‘riding’), which was not used to denote a thoroughfare until the 16th century. The surname is particularly common in Yorkshire and Lancashire but occurs with various spellings in smaller numbers widely across England.
variant of Rhode , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rhodus
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Rhodes or German Rhodius, a Latinized form of Rode , perhaps indicating the personal as opposed to the topographic name (see Rode 1).

variants.name: Roads
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): variant of   Rhodes  .

variants.name: Rod
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rod, or a topographic name for somene who lived in a woodland clearing, from a derivative of Middle High German roden ‘to clear land for cultivation’. Compare Rhodes .
Norwegian (Rød): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’.
Czech and Croatian: from a short form of the Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘family, relatives’, e.g. Rodoslav.

variants.name: Roades
meanings: English: variant of   Rhodes  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rhoades
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Rhodes  .

variants.name: Rhoads
meanings: English: variant of   Rhodes  .

variants.name: Rhode
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu) designating someone who lived by a woodland clearing, or for someone who came from a place so named, such as Road (Somerset), Rhode (Somerset), Road Farm in Colebrook (Devon), Rhode in Halberton (Devon), Roade (Northamptonshire), Rode (Cheshire), and Rodd (Herefordshire).
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a reed bed, from Middle English rode (Old English hrēod). See also Rude and Trude .
German: habitational name from any places called Rhode (Lower Saxony, Rhineland) and Rhoden (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, former Silesia).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Eideard
meanings: Gaelic equivalent of Edward .

variants.name: Édouard
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Edvard
meanings: form of English Edward .

en.lifeSummary: When John Edward Rhodes was born in 1620, in Guernsey, his father, Walter Wilson Rhodes, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Joanna Barstow, was 39. He married Anne Marbury Browne on 9 December 1634, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 22 November 1701, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Edward Rhodes est né en 1620, à Guernesey, son père, Walter Wilson Rhodes, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Joanna Barstow, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Anne Marbury Browne le 9 décembre 1634, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1701, à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans.

Lui sposato Anne Marbury Browne il 9 dicembre 1634, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 novembre 1701, nel Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Edward Rhodes(이)가 1620년 건지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Wilson Rhodes(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Joanna Barstow(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1634년 12월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 Anne Marbury Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1701년 11월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Anne Marbury Browne em 9 de dezembro de 1634, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1701, em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Edward Rhodes родился в 1620 г. в местности Гернси, его отцу по имени Walter Wilson Rhodes было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Joanna Barstow, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Marbury Browne 9 декабря 1634 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 ноября 1701 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год.

Se casó con Anne Marbury Browne el 9 de diciembre de 1634, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1701, en Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 81 años.
